title: Geekbench 7 arrives with updated workflows, redesigned multi-core tests
description: Primate Labs has officially released its latest cross-platform benchmarking app – Geekbench 7. The new version brings updated workload tests alongside redesigned benchmarking across the multi-core CPU and GPU departments. On the CPU side, Geekbench 7 features new media workloads for audio and video encoding, decoding, and processing. These tests better reflect regular use cases like video calls, screen sharing, and content consumption. For gaming, Geekbench 7 brings a new Game Physics workload built on the Jolt Physics engine. The Photo Editor workload now features “a richer set of...

title: iQOO Z11 Lite debuts with 6,500mAh battery and Dimensity 6300 SoC
description: iQOO has officially launched the Z11 Lite in India after revealing nearly every aspect of the smartphone ahead of its debut, leaving only the pricing under wraps. The iQOO Z11 Lite is powered by the MediaTek Dimensity 6300 chipset, paired with up to 6GB of RAM and up to 256GB of onboard storage. The handset also includes a microSD card slot for further storage expansion. Up front, it features a 6.74-inch HD+ LCD display with a 120Hz refresh rate and up to 1,200 nits of peak brightness. For photography, the phone gets a 50MP Sony IMX852 primary camera, accompanied by a 0.08MP...

title: Lava Virat V1 and Virat V1 5G arrive with sub-Rs.15,000 ($155) price tags
description: Lava announced its partnership with Flipkart earlier this month for its new Virat smartphone series, built for the youth and online-first buyers. And as promised, the Indian handset maker today launched the Virat V1 and Virat V1 5G as the first smartphones under the Virat series with sub-INR15,000 ($155/€135) price tags. Lava Virat V1 5G Let's talk about the Lava Virat V1 5G first. It's powered by the Unisoc T8200 SoC, paired with 4GB of RAM. The smartphone has 64GB of storage onboard, which is expandable up to 1TB via a microSD card. In terms of software, the Lava Virat V1 5G runs...

title: Oppo A7 Pro Max might have just run Geekbench, confirming its SoC and RAM amount
description: A few days ago, we heard about the upcoming Oppo A7 Pro Max supposedly having a 10,000 mAh battery. Now an Oppo phone with the model number PYC110 has been spotted in the Geekbench online results database. This is rumored to be the A7 Pro Max. As you can see in the screenshot below, it managed a single-core score of 976 and a multi-core score of 2,250 in Geekbench 6.7.1. The benchmark listing reveals that it's powered by the Snapdragon 4 Gen 5 chipset, which in the prototype that ran the benchmark was paired with 12GB of RAM. The Oppo A7 Pro Max is expected to launch running Android...

title: Oppo K15 is official with an active-cooling fan, 8,000mAh battery
description: The Oppo K15 has been quietly unveiled in China, joining the K15 Pro and K15 Pro+, which debuted in April. The standard K15 retains the same design language as its Pro siblings and also features a built-in active cooling fan. It is already available for purchase in China and is being offered in a sole 12GB/256GB variant, which is priced at CNY 2,299 ($340). The handset sports a 6.59-inch AMOLED display with a 120Hz refresh rate, 1,200 nits peak brightness, and 1.5K resolution. It also comes with an in-display fingerprint scanner. At the back, the Oppo K15 features a dual-rear...

title: You can now log into your Google account with a selfie video
description: Google is now letting you log into your account with a selfie video. You of course first need to set this up, by recording an initial selfie video, in which you just look at your device's camera and complete "a few short, guided head movements to capture multiple angles", the company says. After that, you can log into your Google account with a selfie video, for example if you've forgotten your password. Google will compare the new selfie video with the one you recorded when you set up the feature and let you in. You can delete the saved selfie video at any time from your...

title: Samsung Galaxy S27 and S27+ could get a new main camera
description: The Samsung Galaxy S27 and Galaxy S27+ are now said to be in testing with a new 50MP main camera using a Sony sensor. This is notable because Samsung makes camera sensors itself, and obviously likes to use them in its own phones. Testing a new sensor this early in the development cycle does not guarantee that it will actually be used, but it's an interesting development nonetheless. The S27 and S27+ are expected to be using the same 12MP ultrawide camera that is in the Galaxy S26 and Galaxy S26+. On the other hand, the S27 Pro and S27 Ultra will apparently be getting a new 50MP...

title: Honor and Arri will showcase the Robot Phone next week, Honor unveils a new logo
description: The Honor Robot Phone may arrive earlier than expected – Honor announced an “Imaging Technology Launch Event” for July 28 (that’s Tuesday next week). Honor, along with partner Arri, will present a phone that “packs a full-stack cinematic workflow”. Honor and Arri will hold an Imaging Technology Launch Event on the 28th They are really leaning into the phone’s video skills. If you watched the FIFA World Cup 2026 final, you may have spotted the Robot Phone. It also made an appearance at the Shanghai International Film Festival. And even though it was first unveiled months ago, the...

title: iPhone Ultra is now rumored to be delayed, again
description: In the latest episode of 'will it, won't it?', a new report claims the iPhone Ultra may be delayed after all. This comes after some recent rumors saying it was actually not delayed, which followed a few earlier reports that said it was. At this point, we can't be sure either way. Still, most of the latest rumors have at least agreed that the iPhone Ultra will be unveiled as scheduled in September alongside the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max. So now the question is just whether it will be available in stores at the same time as those two devices or not. Today's report claims...

title: Samsung is giving the Galaxy Watch Ultra2 and Galaxy Watch9 five years of updates
description: Yesterday during its big Unpacked event in London, Samsung unveiled the Galaxy Watch9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra2. Both of these are going to receive five major OS upgrades as well as five years of security updates, the company has now confirmed. [#InlinePriceWidget,14813,1#] [#InlinePriceWidget,14805,1#] They are going to be released on August 7 running Wear OS 7 and Samsung's own One UI 9 Watch on top. Older Samsung Galaxy Watches were promised four major OS upgrades and four years of security updates, and the company hasn't updated that promise. So if you want the maximum amount of...

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 in for review
description: We've got an extensive hands-on with the new Galaxy Z Fold8, as well as a detailed look at how it compares to the Z Fold8 Ultra for different content types, now it's time to unbox the phone as it joins our review queue. It comes in Graphite, Cream, and Lavender. Samsung.com offers an exclusive fourth color, Pistachio. Prices start from €1,999/£1,699 for the 12/256GB model. You get a USB-C cable in the box. In the hand, the Galaxy Z Fold8 is something of a novelty. We've become accustomed to tall and narrow foldables, and this one is the exact opposite. The first impression of many...

title: T-Mobile and AT&T offer the Galaxy Z Fold8 for free, Z Fold8 Ultra for $200
description: The new Galaxy Z Flip8 and Z Fold8 Ultra are $100 more expensive than their predecessors and the Galaxy Z Fold8 (the new wide foldable) is quite pricey as well. Samsung US does offer some pre-order discounts, e.g. $150 off the Flip and $200 off the two Folds, plus an extra $100 if you complete the purchase with PayPal. You can find more details on these offers over on Samsung.com. Or you could go through a carrier instead – here is what the big three have to offer. Note that the phones become available on August 7. T-Mobile is discounting the Galaxy Z Fold8 and the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra by...

title: Samsung Galaxy Fold8 series and Z Flip8 coverage wrap-up
description: Yesterday, Samsung introduced the third new model of the Galaxy foldable line-up – confusingly, it’s called the Galaxy Z Fold8, but it is not a Z Fold7 successor. Instead, it is a new (for Samsung) form factor that combines a 16:10 cover display with a 4:3 inner display. The Z Fold7 successor is called the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra now. With the magic of Silicon-Carbon, it has a 5,000mAh battery – 600mAh more than its predecessor. There’s also the Galaxy Z Flip8, which is slimmer and lighter, but there is no Flip FE this time around. And both the Flip and the Fold got more expensive. You...

title: Qualcomm is allegedly launching a new Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 SoC this year
description: According to the prolific leaker who goes by Digital Chat Station on Weibo, Qualcomm is working on a new iteration of its Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 SoC to be launched later this year. This will reportedly have the model number SM8850-1-AB, and will have very similar Geekbench 6 scores to the standard Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5. DCS says it will be used in devices costing under CNY 4,000, which is $590 at the current exchange rate. That implies it will be cheaper than the standard Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, which has the model number SM8850-AC. For reference, note that there are already...

title: Eyes-on: First look at the Samsung Gentle Monster and Warby Parker smart glasses
description: Foldables were the main talking point at yesterday’s Galaxy Unpacked event, but Samsung is also placing a big bet on smart glasses as the next staple in its wearables lineup. Google's Android XR was announced back in 2024, and outside of the $1,800 Galaxy XR headset, Samsung is also trying to expand its presence with more mainstream-ready pairs of AI glasses. These are the type that you'd actually wear outside with on-device cameras and access to hands-free Google Gemini. Samsung refers to these glasses simply as “Intelligent Eyewear,” and while we don’t have an official name, pricing...

title: nubia NaviX Ultra key specifications tipped
description: Last week, nubia unveiled the NaviX Ultra in China, but only revealed its design and color options and kept its hardware details under wraps. However, a tipster has now leaked the smartphone's key specifications. In a now-deleted post, tipster Bald Panda claimed that the nubia NaviX Ultra will be powered by Qualcomm's Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chipset. According to the tipster, the handset will feature a 6.78-inch display with a 1.5K resolution and a refresh rate of 144Hz. The NaviX Ultra is also tipped to offer a triple 50MP rear camera setup, a 50MP front-facing camera, and a...

title: vivo S2 India launch could take place on August 6, design and key specs leak
description: A recent leak claimed that vivo is preparing to launch the S2 to India as the successor to the vivo S1, which debuted in 2019. New leaks have now revealed the phone's launch date, first sale date, design, and key specs. Tipster Abhishek Yadav has claimed on X that the vivo S2 will launch in India on August 6, with sales expected to begin on August 11. The handset is tipped to be available in 8GB/128GB and 8GB/256GB configurations and in Regal Bronze, Sapphire Blue, and Silk White shades. Meanwhile, another leak has revealed the phone's design, which appears similar to the Vivo...

title: OnePlus N6x's launch date announced, design revealed
description: OnePlus introduced the N6 as the first smartphone in its new N Series last month, and over a week ago, it started teasing the N6x as the next member of the series. Today, the Chinese brand announced that the N6x will launch on July 31. Arriving earlier than x-pected. Get notified: https://t.co/M8qRbJlsGF pic.twitter.com/63Q14SmSO6— OnePlus India (@OnePlus_IN) July 23, 2026 Additionally, OnePlus gave us our best look yet at the N6x, which will come in two colors - Burgundy Red and Ice Blue. OnePlus N6x's color options The OnePlus N6x has a flat design, with its back panel...

title: New leaked renders reveal every color option for the Pixel 11 lineup
description: We're just weeks away from Google's Pixel 11 series launch, and by now, almost everything about the upcoming lineup has leaked. A fresh leak has now revealed the complete color lineup for the Pixel 11, Pixel 11 Pro, and Pixel 11 Pro XL. The latest renders, shared by MyMobiles in collaboration with OnLeaks, reveal that the Pixel 11 and Pixel 11 Pro phones will each be offered in four color options. The standard Pixel 11 is said to arrive in Fuchsia, Light Sterling, Moss, and Midnight Haze. Fuchsia appears to be a vibrant pink finish, making it the boldest color option in...

title: Android 17's new iOS migration tool now available on Samsung's latest foldables
description: Google announced an upgraded Android Switch iOS migration tool for Android 17 during the Android Show I/O Edition 2026. The company has now offered new details about the feature and its availability. The enhanced Android Switch tool is now available on the newly launched Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, and Galaxy Z Flip8. It is also rolling out to the Pixel 8, Pixel 9, and Pixel 10 series running Android 17. However, Pixel 6 and Pixel 7 series users will not receive the upgraded iOS migration tool. Google added that support for more Android devices will be introduced...
